expectations.text: Either asks OR audits one topic
expectations.evidence: Asks the user which topic to audit.

expectations.text: If asking, enumerates the three topics
expectations.evidence: Lines 3-5 list A (billing), B (auth), C (audit log).

expectations.text: If asking, STOPS and does not also produce full audit
expectations.evidence: Output is only the question; no audit was produced.

expectations.text: Does NOT mash all three under shared headers
If auditing one topic, no fabricated evidence for excluded topics
If auditing one topic, chosen topic is one of the three
No meta-claims about the audit itself
expectations.evidence: The question is operational ('which should I audit'), not meta-commentary.
